<includeonly>
<div class="taxon-filters alert-info border-top-0"><!--

-->{{{info|query title=Taxon lookup|query form at top}}}{{{for template|Taxon}}}{{{field
 |NCBI
 |input type=regexp
 |regexp=/^\d*$/
 |message={{int:only-numbers}}
 |class=form-control
 |placeholder=Enter NCBI ID
 |hidden
}}}
<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row w-100">
<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row px-1 mb-2 mb-lg-0 align-items-lg-center justify-content-lg-center">
<div class="font-weight-bold pr-3">Body site:</div>
<div>{{{field
  |Body site
  |input type=combobox
  |values from property=Body site
}}}
</div>
</div>
<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row px-1 mb-2 mb-lg-0 align-items-lg-center justify-content-lg-center">
<div class="font-weight-bold pr-3">Condition:</div>
<div>{{{field
  |Condition
  |input type=combobox
  |values from property=Condition
}}}
</div>
</div>
<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row px-1 mb-2 mb-lg-0 align-items-lg-center justify-content-lg-center">{{{standard input|run query|class=mw-ui-button mw-ui-progressive|label=Filter}}}
</div>
</div>
{{{end template}}}
</div>
</includeonly><noinclude>
Check also a [[Form:Taxon lookup|twin form]]:

{{#queryformlink: form=Taxon_lookup|link text=<span class="mw-ui-button mw-ui-progressive">Taxon lookup</span>}}
</noinclude>
